CreatedBy:
RUN /bin/sh -c echo -e " 
  fs.file-max = 51200 
  
  net.core.rmem_max = 67108864 
  net.core.wmem_max = 67108864 
  net.core.netdev_max_backlog = 250000 
  net.core.somaxconn = 4096 
  
  net.ipv4.tcp_syncookies = 1 
  net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse = 1 
  net.ipv4.tcp_tw_recycle = 0 
  net.ipv4.tcp_fin_timeout = 30 
  net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time = 1200 
  net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range = 10000 65000 
  net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog = 8192 
  net.ipv4.tcp_max_tw_buckets = 5000 
  net.ipv4.tcp_fastopen = 3 
  net.ipv4.tcp_mem = 25600 51200 102400 
  net.ipv4.tcp_rmem = 4096 87380 67108864 
  net.ipv4.tcp_wmem = 4096 65536 67108864 
  net.ipv4.tcp_mtu_probing = 1 
  net.ipv4.tcp_congestion_control = hybla 
  " | sed -e 's/^\s\+//g' | tee -a /etc/sysctl.conf &&   mkdir -p /etc/security &&   echo -e " 
  * soft nofile 51200 
  * hard nofile 51200 
  " | sed -e 's/^\s\+//g' | tee -a /etc/security/limits.conf # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c apk add --no-cache bash curl dumb-init # buildkit

RUN |1 AWGTOOLS_RELEASE=1.0.20250901 /bin/sh -c apk --no-cache add iproute2 iptables bash &&     cd /usr/bin/ &&     wget https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-tools/releases/download/v${AWGTOOLS_RELEASE}/alpine-3.19-amneziawg-tools.zip &&     unzip -j alpine-3.19-amneziawg-tools.zip &&     chmod +x /usr/bin/awg /usr/bin/awg-quick &&     ln -s /usr/bin/awg /usr/bin/wg &&     ln -s /usr/bin/awg-quick /usr/bin/wg-quick # buildkit
